title: poa sandvicensis
intro: Poa sandvicensis, also known as Sand Island Bluegrass, is a species of grass that is native to the Hawaiian Islands. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Poa sandvicensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and soothe skin irritations. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, salves, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional Hawaiian medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
